comments.author: Gerald Dagher
comments.text:
BB-048 shell polish pass (apps/web only):

**Navigation & a11y**
- SiteHeader: shared NavLinks, isNavActive helper, mobile menu aria-expanded/controls, closes on route change, duplicate nav hidden from AT via aria-hidden
- Skip link uses bb-skip-link (ink-on-paper, uppercase) for WCAG 2.4.1
- Focus-visible rings on wordmark, nav links, footer links, CTAs, story links

**Visual / consistency**
- shell.css: bb-feature-grid for Topics, status page spacing, Gen Z ink focus treatment
- StatusPage component aligns loading/error/not-found chrome
- Footer FOOTER_NAV covers search/explore/topics + editorial links; meta notes sample seed data
- Corrections page adds SeedDataNotice

**Validation:** pnpm --filter @black-book/web typecheck && build — pass

**Still partial:** No live public projections (BB-019), search API (BB-049), geocoding (BB-050), or App Hosting hardening (BB-022). All entity/search/explore views remain seed fixtures with explicit notices.

notes: Implemented deterministic TypeScript and Python entity/historical-location resolution: alias and organization-name normalization, fuzzy/exact matching, address parsing, temporal/geographic and historical-boundary scoring, school-name history, person/organization disambiguation, ambiguity review queue, confidence rationale, reversible decisions, shared gold fixtures, and BB-039 candidate conversion. Validation: domain package 84/84 tests; research worker 30/30 tests; focused TS 8/8 and Python 4/4; ESLint, Ruff, and format checks pass. Domain typecheck remains blocked only by pre-existing concurrent errors in packages/domain/src/relevance/engine.ts. Parent must export ./resolution/index.js from packages/domain/src/index.ts and update plan.md.
close_reason: All BB-041 owned implementation and validation complete; parent barrel/plan integration explicitly handed off.

notes: Implemented BB-029 quarantine-only correction/contribution/abuse intake: strict structured-text + HTTPS-source validation (schema, bytes, characters, links, frequency), spam scoring, duplicate/coordinated campaign detection, immutable hashed originals with separate normalized/privacy forms, independent inbox/moderation state, append-only audit transitions, and moderator block/abuse-report tools. Submissions service requires BB-024 App Check and BB-025 quota decisions and retains BB-021 quarantine-only capability enforcement. Targeted package tests/typechecks/builds, focused ESLint, Prettier, and diff checks pass. Full pnpm validate remains blocked by unrelated concurrent web data-access import and security/observability cycle.
close_reason: BB-029 deliverables and acceptance criteria implemented and targeted validation passed

comments.author: Gerald Dagher
comments.text: Wave3: Admin identity/authz. Owns packages/firebase auth-claims helpers, apps/admin auth modules, docs/security/admin-identity.md, infra/gcp/iap stubs. Do not edit api-public App Check files (BB-024).

comments.author: Gerald Dagher
comments.text: Implemented BB-027 in owned paths: Firebase custom claims/role-permission model, mandatory MFA and 10-minute reauth gates for all privileged actions, server-only role mutation with session revocation, revocation cutoff assertion, sanitized admin login/device/role alert contracts; admin server helpers require verified IAP + Firebase identities with matching email and revoked-token checking; design-only IAP policy/schema/tests and security runbook added. Validation passed: 16 focused tests, Firebase/admin typechecks, package regression tests, ESLint, Prettier, secret scan, and JSON Schema validation. Human steps: provision LB/IAP and restricted accessor group, configure exact IAP JWT audience, enable Firebase MFA and enroll admins, bootstrap first admin claim via audited Admin SDK path, configure alert sink. No live GCP apply. Parent merge needs: export packages/firebase/src/admin-auth.ts from the Firebase barrel and include both new test files in package test scripts.

comments.text:
BB-028 delivered.

Module: apps/web/src/lib/web-security/

src/lib/runtime-hardening/: query normalization, cache keys, response limits, degraded snapshot mode, production error surface, public render path guard, edge handler.

Validation: typecheck, 14 unit tests, build all green.

- JSON Schema: ingress-matrix + both Armor policies

Acceptance evidence:
- AC-ARMOR-1: internetTrafficOnlyThroughLb + internal-and-cloud-load-balancing on both backends
- AC-ARMOR-2: directRunAppUrlsDisabled + load-test-plan direct-url-negative-test
- AC-ARMOR-3: rate_based_ban rules (429) + metrics-alerts-checklist + load-test stub
- AC-ARMOR-4: emergency rule priority 10 + runbook + gcloud snippet (no deploy)

Human apply steps (ordered):
1. Create Armor policies from policies/*.json
2. Create serverless NEGs + backend services (CDN on api-public only)
3. Create global external HTTPS LB + DNS (api.blackbook.app, submit.blackbook.app)
4. gcloud run services update —ingress=internal-and-cloud-load-balancing for both public APIs
5. Run load-test-plan.md in staging; wire metrics-alerts-checklist.md alerts
6. Set ingress-matrix.json status to applied

Note: surface-matrix.json still shows ingress=all from BB-021; BB-023 supersedes at apply time.

value: Wave3: BB-027 admin auth (stronger), BB-028 web security (fast), BB-039 discovery (fast). BB-024 still in flight; BB-025 waits on it.

Multi-agent bead execution pattern: (1) bd ready first; claim with bd update --claim before work. (2) Route low-risk scaffolding/docs/contracts to fast models (composer-2.5-fast); route security/auth/release/core domain to stronger models (gpt-5.6-sol-medium). (3) Strict exclusive path ownership per agent; parent owns plan.md and packages/*/src/index.ts barrel merges. (4) Agents export from local barrels only; parent merges export * after completion. (5) Fix exactOptionalPropertyTypes with conditional spreads, not notes: undefined. (6) No live GCP/Firebase apply; document human cloud steps. (7) Close beads when repo acceptance met even if cloud console steps remain (same as BB-021/024). (8) Launch newly unblocked beads immediately when deps close. (9) Validate package tests+typecheck before claiming parent done. (10) Use bd not TodoWrite; update plan.md coordination tables.
Wave2: BB-020 backup, BB-022 hosting, BB-023 armor, BB-024 appcheck(stronger), BB-038 query-packs; exclusive paths; parent merges barrels.
BB-026 started after BB-025: search/query guardrails on fast model; owns security query guardrails + api-public search guards; BB-040/041/029 ready remain candidates.

Wave 2026-07-17 parallel: BB-019 strong model owns publication/release; BB-021 and BB-037 on fast models for surface/adapter scaffolding; BB-012 deferred ADR-011; BB-048 web polish parallel on apps/web only. Parent merges domain/firebase barrels.
Wave3 add-on: BB-025 rate limits starts after BB-024; owns security rate limit package + API quota helpers; BB-026 remains blocked until BB-025 closes.
